message:
feat(harness): commit SQL pipeline deterministic unit suites (bd-mblr.6.2)

73 tests covering parser (SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/CREATE/JOINs/
compounds/malformed SQL), VDBE (opcodes/cursors/transactions/records/
sorts/aggregates), and function semantics (string/math/type/registry).
All tests use DiagContext for structured failure reporting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Acceptance: CI fails when scripts omit required fields, lose trace continuity, or produce non-actionable terminal failures without artifact linkage.","design":"Run representative script executions through validator pipeline and assert both syntactic and semantic logging quality rules.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Emits machine-readable + human-readable conformance report artifacts for triage.","notes":"This final gate depends on script retrofit (bd-mblr.5.5.2), missing-script completion (bd-mblr.4.5.3), and shared log-quality tests (bd-mblr.5.4.1).  {"id":"bd-mblr.6","title":"Comprehensive Unit Test Expansion and Failure Diagnostics","description":"Define and implement granular, high-signal unit tests across core crates so behavior invariants are validated with deterministic, reproducible diagnostics and minimal mock reliance.","design":"Use a crate-by-crate invariant matrix and deterministic fixtures so unit tests provide root-cause evidence, not opaque failures.","acceptance_criteria":"Every core crate has explicit invariant-focused unit-test coverage targets; new unit suites are deterministic and reproducible; failures emit rich context sufficient for triage without rerunning under a debugger.","notes":"Deferred intentionally for queue hygiene: this bead is a container/coordination umbrella, not a direct implementation lane. Work proceeds through its child tasks; reopen/close this bead during milestone rollup and completion review.","status":"deferred","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:08.395933046Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T00:51:03.695814243Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:08.395933046Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:02:48.792192376Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.6.1","title":"Storage-layer deterministic unit suites","description":"Add granular deterministic unit tests for pager/WAL/MVCC/B-tree/VFS edge behavior (conflicts, rollback, checkpoint ordering, recovery metadata). Output: high-signal unit suites with explicit invariant assertions.","design":"Group tests by subsystem invariant families and reuse deterministic fixtures from bd-mblr.6.4.","acceptance_criteria":"- Storage crates have deterministic unit suites for conflict, rollback, checkpoint ordering, replay metadata, and corruption boundaries.
- Tests assert invariant IDs and include precise expected-state checks.
- Unit failures emit seed/fixture and key state snapshot metadata.","notes":"Storage unit suites should complement, not duplicate, real-backend integration scenarios.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:22.433096468Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T06:37:18.219681331Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T06:37:18.219658839Z","close_reason":"66 storage-layer deterministic unit tests passing across pager/WAL/MVCC/B-tree/VFS. Full diagnostics contract compliance.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:22.433096468Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:52.650262866Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:52.936652072Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:53.214491109Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1446,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## bd-mblr.6.1 Completion — Storage-layer Deterministic Unit Suites

### Agent: BrownMouse (Session 23)

### Deliverables

1. **New module**: `crates/fsqlite-harness/src/storage_unit_suites.rs` (~1320 lines)
2. **Registered** in `lib.rs` as `#[cfg(test)] mod storage_unit_suites;` (after all pub mods)

### Test Suites (66 tests total, all passing)

| Suite | Tests | Coverage |
|-------|-------|----------|
| **Pager** (pager_tests) | 13 | Transaction modes (RO/Immediate/Exclusive/Deferred), mutual exclusion, write-readback, page size boundaries (512/65536), journal header roundtrip, magic validation, checksum stride, lock-byte page |
| **WAL** (wal_tests) | 14 | Frame write/readback, checksum chain integrity, reset, commit frames with db_size, checkpoint planning (Passive/Full/Restart/Truncate), empty WAL noop, already-complete, WAL header/frame header constants |
| **MVCC** (mvcc_tests) | 17 | TxnId boundaries (zero/one/max/sentinel), epoch wraparound, snapshot visibility, CommitSeq monotonicity, version arena alloc/free/reuse, page lock table (acquire/release/contention/release_all/shard_distribution/idempotent_reacquire), transaction state machine (commit/abort/double_commit_panics/commit_then_abort_panics), field initialization, SSI dangerous structure |
| **B-tree** (btree_tests) | 14 | Page type flags (0x02/0x05/0x0A/0x0D), predicates (interior/leaf/table/index), header sizes, leaf/interior header roundtrip, page 1 offset 100, content_offset zero=65536, invalid type/truncated page rejection, cell pointer roundtrip, max_local_payload (leaf_table/other), min_local_payload, overflow detection |
| **VFS** (vfs_tests) | 8 | Write-read roundtrip, file size tracking, multiple file isolation, truncate, read beyond EOF, SHM region creation |
| **Total** | **66** | All 5 storage crates covered |

### Diagnostics Contract Compliance

- All tests follow D-1 through D-5 (bead_id, case, seed, invariant)
- Uses `DiagContext` builder pattern throughout
- Uses `diag_assert_eq!` and `diag_assert!` macros from `test_diagnostics`
- Uses `FixtureSeed` from `unit_fixtures` for deterministic seeds

### Unit Matrix Coverage

Maps to entries UT-STOR-001 through UT-STOR-006:
- UT-STOR-001: Pager transaction modes and isolation → 13 tests
- UT-STOR-002: WAL frame handling and checksums → 14 tests
- UT-STOR-003: MVCC version management → 17 tests
- UT-STOR-004: B-tree page operations → 14 tests
- UT-STOR-005: VFS file operations → 8 tests
- UT-STOR-006: Checkpoint planning → covered in WAL suite

### Quality Gates

- `cargo check -p fsqlite-harness`: PASS (warnings only in other modules)
- `cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib storage_unit_suites`: 66/66 PASS
- `cargo fmt -p fsqlite-harness --check`: clean
- clippy: No warnings in storage_unit_suites.rs

## Deliverables

### Module: crates/fsqlite-harness/src/sql_pipeline_suites.rs (1161 lines)

**Parser Suite (UT-SQL-001..008):**
- SELECT: simple, WHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING, ORDER BY, LIMIT, subqueries
- INSERT: VALUES, SELECT, DEFAULT VALUES
- UPDATE/DELETE with WHERE
- CREATE TABLE with constraints (PK, UNIQUE, NOT NULL, DEFAULT, FK, CHECK)
- Expression precedence (multiplication, parentheses, unary minus, BETWEEN, CASE, IN)
- JOIN types (INNER, LEFT, CROSS, NATURAL)
- Compound queries (UNION, UNION ALL, INTERSECT, EXCEPT)
- Malformed SQL rejection (missing FROM, unterminated strings, empty, double semicolons)
- Lexer tests (integer/string/blob literals, case insensitivity)
- Multi-statement parsing, transaction control, PRAGMA parsing

**VDBE Suite (UT-VDBE-001..007):**
- Opcode encoding, names, byte roundtrips
- Comparison opcodes: Eq, Ne, Lt, Le, Gt, Ge
- Cursor opcodes: OpenRead, OpenWrite, Close, SeekGE/GT/LE/LT
- Transaction opcodes: Transaction, AutoCommit, Savepoint
- Record opcodes: MakeRecord, Column, ResultRow, Rowid, NullRow
- Sort opcodes: SorterOpen, SorterInsert, SorterSort, SorterNext, SorterData
- Aggregate opcodes: AggStep, AggStep1, AggValue, AggFinal, AggInverse
- Opcode name uniqueness, P4 variants

**Function Suite (UT-FUN-001..005):**
- String functions (length, substr, replace, trim, upper, lower, hex, quote, instr)
- Math functions (abs, round)
- Type inspection (typeof, coalesce, nullif, ifnull)
- Function registry: case-insensitive lookup, arity checking

All tests use DiagContext from test_diagnostics for structured failure reporting.

## Test evidence
- 73 unit tests all passing
- cargo check --lib: PASS
- cargo test --lib sql_pipeline_suites: 73 passed, 0 failed
- cargo fmt: PASS

## Reproduction
cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib sql_pipeline_suites

Detailed invariant catalog created for 6 critical/high-risk crates (mvcc, core, wal, pager, btree, vdbe).","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:02:49.082627988Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.1.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:02:49.385405145Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.3","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:22.548349418Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.6.4","title":"Unit fixture corpus and deterministic seed harness","description":"Create reusable deterministic unit-test fixtures/seeds for storage pages, SQL statements, and execution traces so failures are exactly reproducible. Output: fixture catalog + seed contract consumed across crates.","design":"Create shared fixture APIs/utilities with explicit normalization rules for deterministic comparisons.","acceptance_criteria":"- Deterministic fixture corpus exists for storage pages, SQL statements, and execution traces.
- Seed contract defines how fixtures are selected and replayed across crates.
- Fixtures are versioned with compatibility notes to prevent silent semantic drift.","notes":"Fixture reuse should reduce duplicated setup logic and improve cross-crate failure comparability.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:33.540618686Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T05:55:38.367865663Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T05:55:38.367841318Z","close_reason":"Implemented: unit_fixtures.rs with FixtureSeed contract, 49 fixtures (8 page, 22 SQL, 14 value, 5 trace), FixtureCatalog API, 27 tests all passing","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:33.540618686Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.4","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:51.826778155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1434,"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## bd-mblr.6.4 Completion — Unit Fixture Corpus and Deterministic Seed Harness

### Agent: BrownMouse (Session 23)

### Deliverables

1. **New module**: `crates/fsqlite-harness/src/unit_fixtures.rs` (~1,500 lines)
2. **Registered** in `lib.rs` as `pub mod unit_fixtures`

### Seed Contract

- `FIXTURE_SEED_BASE = 0x4649_5854_5552_4500` (hex "FIXTURE")
- `FixtureSeed::derive(scope_id)` — standard entry point for tests
- `FixtureSeed::derive_with(base, domain_tag, scope_id)` — explicit domain isolation
- `FixtureSeed::child(index)` — derive sub-fixtures from parent seed
- Domain tags: `page`, `sql`, `trace`, `value` — no cross-domain collisions
- Derivation: `xxh3_64(base_seed_bytes || domain_tag || scope_id)`

### Fixture Categories

| Category | Count | Coverage |
|----------|-------|----------|
| Page     | 8     | All 4 page types (LeafTable, InteriorTable, LeafIndex, InteriorIndex), boundary sizes (512, 4096, 65536), single/multi-cell variants |
| SQL      | 22    | All 8 taxonomy families (SQL, TXN, FUN, VDB, PLN, PGM, EXT, CLI) |
| Value    | 14    | All 5 storage classes (NULL, INTEGER, REAL, TEXT, BLOB) with boundary values |
| Trace    | 5     | Key VDBE opcode sequences (SELECT const, table scan, INSERT, DELETE, aggregate) |
| **Total**| **49**| Full coverage of fixture categories |

### Key Types

- `FixtureSeed` — deterministic seed with derivation contract
- `PageFixture` — storage page with raw data and metadata
- `SqlFixture` — categorized SQL statements with behavior tags
- `ValueFixture` — storage class value representations
- `TraceFixture` — VDBE opcode sequence expectations
- `FixtureCatalog` — unified entry point (build, filter, validate, serialize)

### Tests (27 total, all passing)

- Seed contract: determinism, scope isolation, domain isolation, child derivation
- Page fixtures: determinism, valid headers, cell counts, type coverage, boundary sizes
- SQL fixtures: determinism, family coverage, non-empty statements, behavior tags
- Value fixtures: determinism, storage class coverage
- Trace fixtures: determinism, valid opcodes
- Catalog: determinism, unique IDs, JSON roundtrip, summary stats, filtering

### Quality Gates

- `cargo check -p fsqlite-harness`: PASS
- `cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib unit_fixtures`: 27/27 PASS
- `cargo fmt`: clean
","created_at":"2026-02-13T05:55:36Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-mblr.6.5","title":"CI unit-test shard matrix and summary artifacts","description":"Run unit suites in CI shard matrix by crate family with deterministic ordering and publish concise per-shard failure summaries plus raw logs. Output: reliable CI unit-test workflow with triage-ready artifacts.","design":"Use manifest-driven shard composition to keep CI config maintainable and reproducible locally.","acceptance_criteria":"- CI executes unit suites in deterministic shard matrix by crate family or risk tier.
- Each shard publishes concise summary + raw logs/artifacts for failing tests.
- Shard strategy balances runtime and signal without hiding flaky behavior.","notes":"CI unit matrix should align naming and artifact conventions with E2E gates for operator consistency, but it should not be blocked by final flake-policy tuning so implementation can proceed in parallel.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:33.582757149Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T00:10:14.843547916Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:33.582757149Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:55.587175625Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:55.937532522Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:56.237186092Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-mblr.6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-mblr.6.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T00:01:56.522450512Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
